intro: A humorous point-and-click adventure game, full of clever puzzles, quirky characters, and unexpected twists. Get ready for hours of fun, a long journey, a few fairies... and a little love story.
description:
LeMrosh in the Lazy Kingdom is a funny point-and-click adventure game set in a medieval kingdom where nothing is as it seems. What starts out as a simple quest quickly turns into a tangle of puzzles, strange items and quirky characters. Explore, experiment, and talk along the way through a kingdom where even the wrong choices can lead to unexpected (and often hilarious) results - whether you mean to or not.

FEATURES
■ Classic point-and-click adventure game inspired by 90’s legends
■ Over 12 hours of story-driven gameplay with multiple twists
■ Solve clever and unconventional puzzles
■ Explore over 200 unique locations across a strange medieval kingdom
■ Meet a large cast of quirky and memorable characters
■ Full English voiceover across the entire game
■ Unique interactions: most actions trigger custom, often humorous responses
■ Experiment freely - even wrong choices can lead to funny outcomes
■ Clean interface with intuitive actions (examine, use, talk, collect)
■ A lighthearted story with a touch of romance

As LeMrosh says: "Spin it like never before."

If you enjoy classic adventure games, witty humor, and discovering unexpected solutions, LeMrosh in the Lazy Kingdom is waiting.
